feedback: A well-crafted JI composition demonstrating clear formal structure, thoughtful orchestration, and warm sonics. The piece shows solid compositional intent and technical execution across all dimensions.  A structurally well-arced JI/hexany piece with genuine voice-leading and automation craft, somewhat undercut by mix-balance and brightness artifact warnings that suggest the final render doesn't yet match the quality of its composition.

A technically sophisticated xenharmonic composition with intentional orchestration and professional finishing. The hexany approach demonstrates serious harmonic knowledge, though the critical success factor—whether the just-intonation material sounds musically cohesive rather than abstract—requires listening to confirm.  A well-paced, structurally convincing hexany-based piece with a real arc and legitimate JI harmonic interest, undercut somewhat by several voices flagged for harsh/piercing high-frequency content that likely needs taming.  A genuinely composed, complete septimal-JI ambient/electronic piece with a real arc and rich orchestration; euphonic and satisfying rather than daring, with some brittle high-end percussion as its main flaw.
